overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through the futuristic Night City. The journey begins in an industrial area with massive elevated highways and storage tanks, transitions through a busy intersection with towering skyscrapers, continues along a palm-lined sidewalk with outdoor cafes, and ends with views of ultra-modern corporate architecture beneath elevated transit tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with massive elevated highways and storage facilities

events.description: large military transport truck drives past from left to right
begins turning left while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial street, observing the large spherical storage tanks and elevated highway infrastructure

notable_agents.action: military truck driving past the camera position
brown sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: massive curved concrete and steel highway ramps towering overhead
large spherical metal tanks supported by wooden frameworks
long red warehouse structure with green-tinted windows
tall pole with horizontal traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial street dominated by massive elevated highway ramps curving overhead. Large spherical storage tanks sit on the right side behind wooden supports. Vehicles including a military truck and brown sedan pass by on the multi-lane road. The camera walks forward along the street, passing traffic signals and approaching an intersection with towering futuristic buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with towering corporate skyscraper

events.description: crossing from industrial zone into commercial downtown area with taller buildings
waiting for and crossing the intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating the crosswalk while turning left to face the towering skyscraper marked 06

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with large white 06 marking near the top
large screen displaying advertisement with woman's face
multiple directional signs and traffic control devices

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide intersection, transitioning from the industrial area to a commercial downtown zone. The massive Tower 06 dominates the skyline ahead, while digital billboards and street signage line the roads. Pedestrians cross in various directions, and the elevated highway system shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera turns. The ground changes to marked crosswalk lines as the player navigates through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with outdoor dining and palm trees

events.description: entering palm-lined pedestrian zone with outdoor cafe seating
approaching modern glass architecture with elevated transit tracks becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing outdoor cafes and pedestrians, heading toward the modern city center

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead on the sidewalk
man in tank top standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk providing sparse shade
tables with yellow umbrellas outside a restaurant
large rotating hamburger sign above a fast food establishment
massive futuristic building with geometric glass facade and stacked architecture

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and outdoor cafe seating with yellow umbrellas. The player passes various pedestrians including a woman in a white dress and a man near a building entrance. A large rotating burger sign marks a fast food restaurant on the left. In the distance, a massive modern glass skyscraper with geometric architecture rises above the street, while elevated transit tracks become visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate plaza beneath elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to admire the towering architecture and overhead transit tracks

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the massive architecture and elevated transit system while continuing forward

entered.detail: curved monorail or train tracks suspended high above the street
tall rotating digital advertising display with multiple screens

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the approach to a massive modern glass skyscraper with intricate geometric architecture. The camera tilts upward to capture the elevated transit tracks curving overhead against the partly cloudy sky. An advertising kiosk stands on the right side of the walkway. The palm trees and cafe seating from the previous section fall behind as the player enters a more corporate plaza area with fewer pedestrians and a focus on the towering futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a gritty industrial district into a polished, ultra-modern corporate plaza. It begins on a wide industrial street beneath curving highway ramps and spherical storage tanks, moving forward past military vehicles toward a distant skyline. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, the environment shifts from industrial gray to a vibrant commercial zone dominated by digital billboards and the towering presence of Tower 06. The scene then opens onto a palm-lined sidewalk featuring outdoor cafes with yellow umbrellas and rotating signs, before the camera turns toward a massive glass skyscraper with intricate geometric architecture. Finally, the view tilts upward to capture elevated transit tracks curving against a partly cloudy sky as the player enters a sleek corporate plaza.
